_generated: Auto-generated by scripts/gen-design-system-manifest.ts — do not edit. Edit docs/design-system/themes.manifest.json instead.

core.label: Core
core.blurb: The productised IP — POS, KDS, and the unified Guest hub (CRM + Concierge + WhatsApp). Operational clarity outranks brand expression.

files.description: Current design — 1:1 port of the core-suite mockup (.core-suite scope): .shell / .card / .btn / .stat / .tk / .kds-* rules for POS + Guest + KDS, via CoreShell.
Legacy --cmd-* palette + .cmd-* / .ka-* / .kds-* kitchen chrome + .wa-console / .wa-fa-* dialog classes (KDS + WhatsApp dialogs). Dead .pos-/.crm-/.cncrg- families pruned.
Typed JS mirror of the --cmd-* palette. Imported into the swatches below.

core.fonts: src/app/core/layout.tsx loads its own next/font instances of --font-admin-body (Inter), --font-admin-display (Fraunces) and --font-admin-mono (JetBrains Mono) — independent from the admin layout's, so a Core-only font tweak can't drift admin. POS + Guest (.core-suite) use Fraunces for display headings; the KDS kitchen wall stays Inter + mono.

admin.label: Admin
admin.blurb: The back-office around the Core modules: Operations, Inventory, People, Customers, Finance, Growth, Intelligence, System. Glassmorphism + warm-neutral dark canvas.

files.description: Shared base CSS surface (formerly themes/admin): [data-admin-theme="dark"|"light"] token blocks + AdminShell + glass-* + v2-* + admin mobile (.v2-m-*). Kept as the base for login + the staff portals + Core; outlives the v2 deletion.
Typed mirror of the [data-admin-theme] tokens for Recharts + inline SVG + the boot script that sets the theme attribute before paint.

admin.fonts: src/app/admin/layout.tsx loads its own Inter + Fraunces as --font-admin-body and --font-admin-display. /manager, /kitchen, /franchisee, /login and /terminal layouts load the same independently (they sit outside the AdminShell but stay admin-themed) so a font change in one wouldn't drift admin.

homepage.label: Homepage
homepage.blurb: The public storefront — /, /menu, /checkout, /order, /rewards, location pages. Hospitality outranks density; warm cream canvas + deep burgundy brand.

files.description: @theme inline block. @import-ed by globals.css so Tailwind v4 generates bg-italia-* / text-italia-* utilities (ships globally).
.pub-* form classes, body styling, delivery-* keyframes. JS-imported by (public)/layout.tsx, route-scoped.
Typed JS mirror of --color-italia-* tokens. Imported into the swatches below.

homepage.fonts: src/app/(public)/layout.tsx loads its own Lora + Cormorant Garamond as --font-homepage-body and --font-homepage-heading (V8 Trattoria editorial-serif duo). Independent next/font instances from admin so weight / subset changes don't drift across themes.
